item2.detail: 11 officers with full roles, tenure, and prior experience. No additional officers surfaced.

item9.burden: Standard obligation cross-reference table. 25 obligation categories mapped to agreement sections and FDD items. Key: personal guaranty (Exhibit III) is separate row.

item11.detail: Fully extracted in A1: pre-opening support, ongoing support, advertising programs, computer systems, training program with hours table, site selection, manual (811 pages).

franchisee_must: Refer all National Accounts to franchisor
Not solicit outside Area via any channel
Meet minimum Client Bid schedule or face territory reduction
franchisor_controls: Right to operate under different marks in/outside Area
Granting rights to others outside Area
franchisee_forbidden: Soliciting Unit Franchisees or clients outside Area
Entering National Account contracts without consent
Operating additional territories without separate agreement

item13.detail: Full trademark roster, license agreement details, infringement provisions, domain restrictions.

item14.detail: No patents, copyright claims, confidentiality obligations.

franchisee_must: Appoint Designated Manager (controlling owner) who completes training
Provide personal guaranty from all individual shareholders/members
Require confidentiality covenants from all managers/field reps/personnel with access
franchisee_forbidden: Delegating Designated Manager obligation without prior approval
Conducting business that reflects unfavorably on marks

franchisee_must: Operate only Anago Subfranchise Business from office
Keep open minimum hours/days per Manuals
franchisor_controls: May set maximum and minimum prices (subject to law)

item18.detail: No public figures used. Single-sentence item.
